subject.pose: Walking pose matching reference: mid-stride, three-quarter view, arms relaxed at sides, one leg forward, natural gait
subject.scale: full body, occupies 70-80% of frame height

rendering.shading_levels: 2-3 distinct shade levels per color, no smooth gradients

line_work.type: Rough, sketchy outlines with slight variation
line_work.weight: Medium to heavy, varies naturally along stroke
line_work.quality: Hand-drawn feel, not perfectly clean, slight wobble
line_work.outline: Bold dark outlines around all major forms
line_work.inner_lines: Lighter sketch lines for details and form definition

color_palette.shadow_style: Hard-edged shadow shapes, not soft gradients
color_palette.saturation: Medium saturation, vibrant but not neon
rules: Use flat base colors for each area
Add one shadow tone per base color (darker, same hue)
Optional rim light or highlight as third tone
Keep shadow edges hard and graphic
Avoid smooth gradients or realistic rendering

subject_placement.vertical: Full body visible, feet near bottom with padding

composition.ground_plane: Simple ground shadow or subtle surface indication

background.color: Simple flat color or very subtle gradient
background.elements: None - clean backdrop to emphasize character

lighting.rim_light: Optional bright edge on shadow side for separation

pose_reference.usage: Use as pose guidance only - match body position, stance, and gesture
pose_reference.interpretation: Character should match the walking pose exactly but rendered in the cell-shaded style

must_have: Rough sketchy outlines with hand-drawn quality
